items.title: ESCMID Global 2026: Zelicapavir demonstrates benefits for high-risk adults with RSV
items.summary: Enanta is in a strong position to dominate the largely untapped RSV therapeutics market with a Phase III trial on the horizon.

items.title: Pharma Meets AI Conference 2026: Key barriers to scaling AI in drug development
items.summary: Strong systems that enable trust and governance are key to enabling the growth of AI technologies in drug development.

items.title: ESCMID Global 2026: Adibelivir emerges as potential disease-modifying therapy for HSV
items.summary: Innovative Molecules' adibelivir had a favourable pharmacokinetic profile and proved safe and efficacious in Phase I clinical trials.

items.title: 500,000 patients’ data for sale online after UK Biobank breach
items.summary: UK Biobank data from all 500,000 participants within the charity’s health database was put up for sale on the Chinese e-commerce website Alibaba.

items.title: Sanofi receives FDA approval for Tzield in paediatric diabetes
items.summary: Sanofi has received approval from the US FDA for a supplemental biologic licence application for Tzield, allowing its use to delay stage 3 T1D onset in children as young as one year diagnosed with stage 2 T1D.
